name: Catechism of Repugnance
effect: Ranged attacks of the target within half weapon range gain an additional -1 AP.

name: Psalm of Righteous Smiting
effect: The target gains +1 Strength and -1 AP for melee attacks.

name: Refrain of Blazing Piety
effect: The target suffers three automatic hits with Strength: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Seeking.

name: War Hymn
effect: All models of the target gain +1 Attack.
